creator: bas@it-core.org
text:
net/asterisk fails to build after update to 1.8.0 because it seems like patch files are left from 1.4.x

Fix: patch-channels::chan_sip.c - remove
patch-rtp_timeout - remove
patch-suppress_log_dups.diff - remove
patch-include::asterisk::utils.h - replace with new patch-include::network.h
patch-Makefile.rules - patch :)
---
All changes is in attached .patch file

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/asterisk/
make install clean
